creator: sghctoma@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 208942
Ghidra 9.1 port

Hi all,
I was finally able to take a loot at this. The attached shar updates devel/ghidra to version 9.1, which implicitly resolves the Gradle version issue. The port is now also adapted to the new bsd.java.mk system.

The port now builds fine with Poudriere on 11.3-RELEASE-p4, 12.0-RELEASE-p11, 12.1-RELEASE and 13.0-CURRENT.

Cheers,
Toma
